rules.limit: Only food additives assessed and permitted by SFA may be used; verify applicable schedule and food category.
rules.sourceTitle: SFA - Regulatory Limits for Food Additives
rules.notes: Starter entry. Daily updater will replace/append AI-extracted records.

rules.limit: Food sold in Singapore must comply with SFA regulatory contaminant limits.
rules.sourceTitle: SFA - Regulatory Limits for Contaminants in Food
rules.notes: Starter entry. Confirm detailed ML by contaminant and food category.

rules.limit: Searchable by additive name, synonym, INS number, functional class and food category.
rules.notes: International reference; local law takes priority.
